title: Running ✔️ [UNEDITED]
description:
[Not been edited since 2020, re-uploaded in 2024 after an accidental takedown]


Lila was always running. Running from what? Life, Being adopted, All sorts. Ever since she was a little toddler, life has never been easy. She can't remember the last time she hadn't run away from being fostered. She never had a stable home or a stable family. She never really liked staying in one place too long but the one thing that stayed the same was the feeling of loneliness and abandonment. She build her walls sky high, with only the chosen few able to slip past. But even they couldn't go too far. 

She was always known as the 'Silent Girl' the one who no one goes near unless they wanted to go missing. People at her school believe she's a part of the most dangerous gangs The Vipers.

They're not far from the truth. 

What happens when she learns of her unknown family? The same as her, They all aren't innocent and have secrets of their own they're purposely hiding.

title: 𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐠𝐢𝐫𝐥 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐧𝐞𝐞𝐝𝐬 𝐬𝐚𝐯𝐢𝐧𝐠
description:
-'๑'-

She's broken. Tired. Hurt.

Aria Sky is an innocent 20 year old girl that works at the 'Un Beau Café'. She loves it there. Everyone see's that she's always happy and smiling, no worry's or bad things happening in her life. 

Or so you think that. Behind that mask she is a broken, insecure girl that gets abused by her vile, possessive ex. She has to work to get money, just for him to take it for himself. She has to do everything around the house, and if she gets something wrong she gets punished.
She just wants to escape the living hell she's in. 

Matteo Bianchi is a cold, ruthless, emotionless man. He is a man that sleeps with any woman he can find then makes them leave the next morning, not with a care in the world. He has no time for relationships and caring for anyone. Love doesn't exist for him. He is the most powerful and dangerous person you can ever meet. He is the leader for the 'Black vipers'. The most well known gang in the world. Everyone's heard of him, and everyone is terrified of him. You might just want to avoid this man as much as you can. 

So what happens when Aria meets him for the first time but not on the way she expected?
Will they ever find love for each other?

Read on and find out!! <3

title: Face
description:
"𝗜𝘁'𝘀 𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗱 𝘁𝗼 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗴𝗲𝘁 𝗺𝘆 𝗽𝗮𝘀𝘁 𝘄𝗵𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘁'𝘀 𝘄𝗿𝗶𝘁𝘁𝗲𝗻 𝗮𝗹𝗹 𝗼𝘃𝗲𝗿 𝗺𝘆 𝗴𝗼𝗱𝗱𝗮𝗺𝗻 𝗯𝗼𝗱𝘆."
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
Up to the age of 17, May had lived a normal life with the usual friends, family and partners. She thought she was an ordinary girl but that took a drastic change when her parents passed away. It turns out her whole life has been a lie. The family, country, and life she was living in wasn't hers. She was sent to her real family in Italy, with 5 brothers and a father. 

The Rosso's 

Her life gets changed over night. She now has to adapt to a new country, new home, new family, new school, and a new love life.

She thought everything was normal in this new family too until the ghosts of her past that she didn't remember, due to trauma, came to haunt her. She now had to uncover how she ended up in adoptive care, and this would uncover many wounds and would cause new ones.

She has no choice but to get married due to a contract made when she was born, but giving up is not an opinions for May as she must face her new challenges. 
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
"𝙔𝙤𝙪 𝙝𝙖𝙫𝙚 𝙖𝙡𝙬𝙖𝙮𝙨 𝙗𝙚𝙚𝙣 𝙩𝙝𝙚 𝙗𝙧𝙞𝙜𝙝𝙩𝙚𝙨𝙩 𝙨𝙩𝙖𝙧 𝙞𝙣 𝙢𝙮 𝙙𝙖𝙧𝙠𝙚𝙨𝙩 𝙣𝙞𝙜𝙝𝙩𝙨."

title: The Little Crow
description:
|| Everything changes when you fall in love with the enemy. ||

When General Niall Killian, a high ranked prodigy, recruits the newly graduated Thea Rhaanan to work for him, his hope is that she will be the key to unlocking incredibly valuable information from an uncooperative source. This information being exactly what he needs to finally bring an end to the decades long conflict between the Aiverian State and its despised rebels, the Elorian Crows.  

However, Thea has her own ideas.

Realizing that helping Niall may mean turning on her own people, the very people the Elorian Crows fight for, Thea must decide if trusting Niall is the right thing to do... especially when working for the State means being in the heart of the lions den and surrounding herself with people who hate her. 

Of course, her confusion and fear only worsens when she finds herself not only growing close to her new co-workers, but also starting to develop feelings for the General himself.

title: MINE
description:
"Get off of me!" I said to the tall man stood next to me.
" Sir what should we do with her?" Suddenly a tall figure towered over me I wouldn't admit it but If I wasn't being held against my will in the middle of the street I would of found him attractive.


"Get her in the car she's coming home with us" What!? No this isn't happening before I could think i elbowed the man stood holding my arm in the nose earning a groan of pain.

While he was "distracted" I ran forward slapping the boss I assume across the face. "You shouldn't have done that" the boss said and I instantly blacked out.


Although before I blacked out I heard a distant "your mine now princess"

Oh no.

title: Female military doctor from 60 Island
description:
六零海島女軍醫

On the night of her eighteenth birthday, Ji Shishi suddenly awakened to her past life memories, only to realize that she had actually traveled through a period novel and would become a hard-working stepmother in the future.
The "she" in the book takes care of her old and mean mother for her military husband. Even though she was "accidentally" miscarried by her stepson and cannot get pregnant again, she still raises her three naughty and mischievous stepsons to become bosses.
When she was old, her military husband, who had no worries, finally became famous, and her stepsons were moved to treat her as their own mother. Later, their family was even made into a TV series, which attracted the envy of countless people.
Ji Shishi: "..." What is there to envy?
Working as an unpaid nanny for a lifetime for someone who killed his own child, and having to endure countless hardships during this period, is this worthy of envy?
This stepmother will be whoever she likes to be, but she doesn't want to be a stepmother anymore.
But unfortunately, Ji Shishi's memory recovered too late. She was already engaged to the male protagonist. Ji Shishi could only prepare to break off the engagement. Unexpectedly, her stepsister suddenly wanted to fight for the marriage.
Ji Shishi was very happy now. The vicious step-sister actually jumped into the fire pit to be a nanny. She let her do it for free, no thanks.
After getting rid of her troubled marriage and thinking that she had a golden finger in the traditional Chinese medicine system, Ji Shishi simply joined the army and went to the island with a large army, where she could collect medicines and see doctors, fall in love with a handsome guy, and live a happy life.
The person Ji Susu envied most in her previous life was Ji Shishi, who had a high status, a good life, and was loved by her three stepsons.
Therefore, once reborn, Ji Susu did not hesitate to snatch the marriage, preparing to enjoy a better life for her sister

title: The Stupid Cannon Fodder is Stunning Today
description:
Published on 11/1/23

Nine, a special force soldier whose only purpose was to serve the Imperial Army, died and transmigrated into the body of Toby Calypto, the useless canon fodder villain of a story. 

Toby Calypto was a two-faced, scheming idiot who tried to hook up with several powerful men and women without any success because no one was stupid enough to touch that with a ten-foot pole. In the story, Toby tried to kill his younger cousin, the female lead, after she rejected his marriage proposal. Then he tried to kill the male lead because the female lead fell in love with him. Then he blackmailed them because why not? In the end, fed up with his nonsense, one of the male lead's best friends stabbed him to death and nobody cared. 

"..."

Nine had no interest in participating in the narrative. 

"Hey--"

Easier said than done. 

Why won't anyone leave him alone?!

title: Mine, Bitten
description:
For years, Lilith “Lily” McDermott was kept in the dark from the McDermott family secret. Now, her estranged father has asked that she join him on an exploit. Despite her father’s peculiar practices and unusual interest in the unknown, she yearns for an adventure outside her dull and ordinary life, and gladly partakes in the excitement.

When Lilith first arrives in the beautiful, untamed wilderness of the Carpathian Mountains, she is alive with feeling and a sense of belonging, but her journey takes a sudden dangerous turn when perilous truths begin to unravel and the dark Carpathian hills reveal a deadly secret of its own.

In the midst of darkness and betrayal, Lilith finds herself at the mercy of a dangerous and unworldly creature, baring fangs and a ravenous thirst that seems to yearn for her blood alone. She is frightened yet drawn by the creature that appears as a man but hunts as a predator. Can she find love in a world filled of darkness and insatiable desires?

title: The Code To A Don's Heart
description:
Peach McCoy
It's fun to dance with the devil until he drops you during a leap. At first, I'd thought this devil was none other than the Don of the Russian Bratva, Viktor Makarovich. He was hunting me down for hacking into his mafia's secret network and knowing a little too much about his little illegal fraternity. He caught me, I escaped and this was the dance I thought would get me killed but someone wants us both dead now. The beat of the music has changed and we have to dance together and not against each other if we want to find the guilty party and be alive to tell the tale. 

There's something about Viktor that lights a spark in me I thought was long gone. The thing is, what I wish we could have cannot happen while we move to what might be the end of our song. I'm smart and I can figure out how to hack into anything I want but for some reason... I only want to know The Code To A Don's Heart. 


Viktor Makarovich
I was just supposed to track down a hacker. It was my way to get away from the Bratva for a while because since my dad and older brother were dead, the mafia was mine. I didn't want it. I just wanted to hunt, kill and protect under someone else's rule but... things have changed. The woman I thought I was going to kill somehow became my only accomplice. Someone wants me- us- dead and I'm sure I know who but the deeper I dig into the affairs of what is now my Bratva, the more unsure I become. 

The connection I feel to Peach isn't helping. For the first time in what seems like forever, I'm more focused on keeping her alive than myself. She challenges me, pushes me to my limits and being around her is more of a high than I've ever felt on a hunt. She doesn't know it but that great mind of hers, in her words, is finding The Code To A Don's Heart.

title: Vita Mia
description:
~>"I like to believe my thorns were once flowers."<~
                                                   
                                               ~*+*~
Arabella Karve has learned to keep everyone away. To lock them out, and make them believe that she is the heartless daughter of the worst man alive. No one has ever taught her what it is like to be loved. This is until she meets Eros Vandare. 

A deadly assassin from Italy is hired to protect the heir to the throne of the mafia. He is a monster, and everyone knows it. He is incapable of love. Until he meets Arabella Karve, the girl he was hired to protect, and he realizes what it means to be alive. What it means to love. 
                                               ~*+*~

"You don't have to come up here every night if you don't want to." I mumble, my eyes fluttering shut. I never want to force him to come lay with me if he doesn't want to, if it makes him uncomfortable.

His arms tighten around me.

"I know I don't have to." His chest rumbles against me, the feeling vibrating within every bone in my body, "and I probably shouldn't."

Disappointment floods my senses and I take a shallow breath, "probably not."

"But I am." 

"Why?" I whisper softly. I tilt my head to look up at him, my eyes meeting his. He gently brushes a a piece of hair out of my face. 

"Because I'm fucking selfish and I need you, regardless of what I should or shouldn't do." 

                                               ~*+*~


**in the process of being edited<3**

title: Bloodlines in the Shadows
description:
Fifteen-year-old Nico has spent his life in the clutches of abusive parents, learning to rely on his sharp wit and rebellious spirit to survive. But one fateful night, he uncovers a truth that shatters his world-those people weren't his real family. He was stolen as a baby, and his true bloodline? The infamous De Lucas, a powerful family who rules the shadows with wealth, influence, and deadly precision.

Suddenly, Nico is thrust into a world beyond anything he's known, reunited with a family of nine towering brothers, each more intense and intimidating than the last. His twin brothers, Leo and Marco, seem ready to crush anyone who even looks at him wrong, and his father, the notorious Vincenzo De Luca, is both a stranger and the fiercest protector Nico has ever known.

But there's one catch: his family is hiding something. They watch his every move, shielding him from a dark truth they're not ready for him to know. Nico's determined to prove he's not the weak kid they think he is, but as he digs deeper, he realizes that some secrets run deeper-and deadlier-than he ever imagined.

title: Goldfinger is the emotional headline system
description:
金手指是情緒頭條系統

[Copywriting 1]
Xu Youning traveled through time and became Xu Youning in 1968, and took over the other side's mess.
The original owner's mother died early and her father remarried, and the reorganized family was not harmonious.
The stepmother was thinking about the job, savings and house left to her by the original owner's mother. She was whispering to the original owner's father, preparing to send her to the countryside as an educated youth, and then take over everything from her legitimately.

Seeing that the original owner's father was somewhat relenting, Xu Youning immediately completed the entry procedures ahead of schedule and moved out of the house, leaving the venue for their family of four to perform, and then watched the stepmother and her three people fighting each other with a smile.

[Copywriting 2]
Xu Qingqing knew that Xu Minghua would become the richest man in Hai City in the future.
She spent ten years trying to win him over. During these ten years, she first persuaded her mother to become Xu Minghua's step-wife, and then made Xu Minghua agree to let her and her brother change their surnames to Xu.
Next, she only needed to take away Xu Minghua's biological daughter's job and send her to the countryside to completely end Xu Youning's path to becoming a rich second-generation.

But who could tell her why Xu Youning suddenly stopped playing by the rules?
Seeing the staff from the Street Office and the Youth Office coming to issue the notice of mobilization to the countryside, Xu Qingqing was completely panicked.

title: a thousand instincts (#1)
description:
Life Lesson #1: If you are planning on going to a nightclub in the middle of sketchy, dark woods, don't.  

Life Lesson #2: If there are too many attractive, healthy people in said nightclub, be alarmed and rethink Life Lesson #1. 

Life Lesson #3: If you were foolish enough to ignore rules 1 and 2, I suggest you haul ass. 

Aeress is one of those special people who obviously need a couple more life lessons...

-----------------------------------------------------------------

     He chuckled. It was dry but it was an addictive sound. "No," he brought his nose against her collar, "not at all." His lips skimmed over her exposed skin. She sighed at his touch, riding the sweet, overwhelming waves that came with.

     "You've barely touched me," Aeress had her hands skimming up the back of his neck and in between his strands. "And I'm falling apart."

     His voice was a little hollow and this worried her. "The bond we have is responsible for that."

     She tugged at him until he looked up. For a moment she just basked in how handsome he was. "I don't think so," she leaned in for a kiss, "I think that you are just about the most fascinating man I have ever met. And we have only just met. I don't think a bond can simply erase the will of an independent woman like me."

     His eyes came to life with a blazing fire. He closed the distance between them and kissed sensation back into her body, setting off every nerve in her flesh. Everything came to a boiling point, sizzling with need. 

++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++

title: Reborn in the 1980s: I became a stepmother in the 1980s
description:
Once she opened her eyes, Si Nian became the fake wealthy daughter straight out of a period drama, only to be sent back to the countryside to marry a divorced man in place of the real wealthy daughter, and on top of that, she had to raise a bunch of brats.
Not only that, she also ran into the reincarnated real wealthy daughter.
In her previous life, Lin Si Si was pressured by her family to marry an older divorced man who treated her coldly and indifferently. Meanwhile, Si Nian, who stole her wealthy daughter status, married a military officer and lived a sweet and happy life.
In her second chance at life, she was determined to steal Si Nian's military officer husband and make her taste the bitterness she had endured. But the real wealthy daughter's plans didn't go as expected.
Instead, Si Nian stayed by the side of the older man, amassed a fortune of billions, and her children flourished.
When she was brought before the older man, Si Nian was not at all flustered:
"This is the man who would rather help others raise children and adamantly refuses to have his own."
While others avoided him, Si Nian's eyes lit up:

"Firstly, being a mother is a noble act, and secondly, I will be a great stepmother."

Years later, after the real wealthy daughter dealt with the military officer's illegitimate child and was robbed of her inheritance, she found herself in unbearable misery. She thought to herself, even if it's not ideal, it's still better than how Si Nian is living. Having children or not, raising others' children - what's the difference from being a nanny?
But one day, that terrifyingly cold and fierce wealthy man, who was now tenderly supporting the pregnant Si Nian out of the car, cradled her in his hands with such affection that it was beyond measure.
Si Nian angrily pulled the man's hair, "Didn't you say you didn't want children!"
The older man gently kissed her hand, "Wife, I was wrong. I'll consider having one next time."

authorBio:
A journey of a thousand miles...

Living vicariously through my characters, because although I want to spread my wings, it is safer not to.

I dropped a lot in 2023. I don't feel new, but I do not feel like trash either.
I consider myself a feminist and a survivor.

NB: I'm always hungry.

I believe in God, who is first the father, also the son, and likewise the holy spirit in one.

title: Paladin
description:
Sam is the most promising swordsman among this year’s crop of Paladin trainees...and knows it. Brash, cocky, and unbeatable with a sword (well, almost), Sam is the kingdom of Thule’s best hope against the violence wrought by demons. The only problem is that Sam is really Lady Samantha, daughter of the seventeenth Duke of Haywood, and if her father has his way, she’ll be marrying a Paladin, not becoming one.

But Sam has never held much interest in playing damsel-in-distress, and so she rescues herself from a lifetime of boredom and matrimonial drudgery.
 
Pity that Tristan Lyons, the Paladin assigned to train her, is none other than the hero of her childhood. He hasn’t recognized her as Lady Samantha--yet-- but if he does, he’ll take away her sword and send her packing. 

Sam is not the only trainee hiding secrets: Braeden is a half-demon with a dark past that might be unforgivable.

Sam, Braeden and Tristan set out for the western coast, charged with rooting out an infestation of demons that has made the West unlivable. As they travel, they uncover a deep-seated corruption of power that threatens to derail everything they stand for. Rebellion stirs, led by a rival faction of warriors who tempt Sam to join them with an irresistible offer. A war between men is coming, and Sam must pick a side. Will saving the kingdom cost her life -- or just her heart?

Reminiscent of Mulan, but with a medieval fantasy twist, Paladin is a tale of adventure, action, and romance.

title: CODENAME: 14
description:
Every year once a child turns 14, a special exam is conducted all over the country. No one knows why the exam is written or the purpose of the exam because there are no results and most of the questions pertain to one's view of life and mentality of a few things. 

No one knows that, this exam is actually the entrance exam to becoming a member of the Nigerian Secret Teenage Spies. [ N. S. T. S.].  An organization located several kilometers below an expensive boutique in the middle of town. 

N. S. T. S is an extremely secretive organization has only few people knows its existence. Even the President doesn't know that there are shadows protecting him and the country. Neither would he think or believe that these shadows are teenagers between the ages of 14-18 years. 

15-year old Adekola Feranmi walks into her home two days after writing her exam only to find two men in black suits and sun glasses talking to her parents. There's also a strikingly handsome teen seated beside them. 

When Feranmi realizes she has been chosen to become a member of the N. S. T. S., she decides to give it her all. The new things she has to learn is very exciting for Feranmi. She even learns how to use a real gun! 

Feranmi must train hard and rise up in the ranks. She must learn how to and protect her country, her family and her loved ones.

title: My Soldier (*Completed*)
description:
"Do you have to leave?" I say through tears. 
"I promise I'll be home before you know it."
That's a lie. It'll feel longer than what it actually is. And it will all feel like hell. 
"I'll be lost and...and...alone without you, Matt" I sob even harder. 
"Don't say that. You'll have Aunt Kathy and Jo. Trust me when I say this: they know exactly what they're doing. They've been through plenty of these before."
I nod, not trusting my voice, afraid I'll break down again. His hand comes to my cheek as he wipes a tear that's falling. His arms then indulge me in a huge hug, his familiar cologne invading  my nostrils. 
"STARKS! We're boarding!" I flinch at the fact that its time to let him go. 
He kisses the top of my head, 
"I love you." He whispers in my ear. 
"I love you too." I respond weakly. 
"I love you most." 
And with a final, hard kiss, he walks away from me. 
Kathy holds me and lets me cry on her shoulder as Matt looks back at me, and walks into the plane.
~~~
**This is an original story by @QuackingDuck. Any other publication of this story has been stolen**

Everything changes when she comes across two dragons, a mother and her new born, and unwittingly becomes the Tamer of the baby dragon when his mother dies. 
This new unlikely bond completely changes her life and opens doors to her future that she would have never thought possible whilst also causing her pain and heartache.

authorBio:
Heya, not much to say bout me except that I'm obviously a bibliomaniac, and have been since a very young age.
I find that if I don't read at least one book a day then I go a bit crazy and I have almost no social life because id rather sit down with a good book.
I've been thinking up stories since I could write, obviously not many of them are worth mentioning, but a few of the idea were good and I might revisit them later.
I grew up watching Buffy the Vampire Slayer and because of that I have always loved, fantasy, supernatural, science fiction, paranormal and Action (Lots and lots of it!).
Because of this I loved vampire romance long before Twilight started the craze.
The books I read are very varied but nearly always action, fiction and supernatural based, here are some of my favourite authors, (NOT IN ORDER OF PREFERENCE):

I'm also a huge fan of Japanese Manga and Anime.


Hope you read and like my stories! Please comment!

title: The Queen's Bond
description:
Twenty years later, it's time for an heir to take the throne and time for a new ruler to lead the wolves. 

It is time for a new beginning.

It is time for a new King and Queen to rise.
_____________________________________

They said I wasn't ready. They said I wasn't smart nor strong enough to lead as Queen. The weight of our world was on my shoulders and it was slowly killing me. I was hated before I had even begun. 

What I didn't know was what the future held: a mate. A king to rule beside me. Little did I know that mate would be the most feared man to walk our grounds. They feared him and now they will fear us. 

I am the Queen and he is my king: The Lycan.

And together, we will rule.

title: Dancing with the Devil
description:
***	Ansel Adams, or Ance as those he knows tend to call him, is a bad man though he didn't consider that to be his fault. His father had been a bad man, his grandfather had been a bad man--hell as far as Ance knew he came from a long line of men were just a bitten rotten down at their core. Everyone that knew Ance knew he was a man who would never change, never give up his lifestyle, never settle down....Until Penelope Reynolds came sobbing into his life. 

	Ance hadn't given much thought to offering this rich man protection as he took a load of stolen goods to market until he realized that the banging sound coming from the crate was a tiny little blond with pigtails, freckles and a bad leg. 

	Suddenly he's struck with a choice. Save the girl and return her to her family or simply let life do what life does and chalk it up to bad luck for little Penelope--in the past the latter choice would have been easy, but not now. 

*** Audrey Reynolds had never been so afraid in her life. Her daughter has been stolen. Her daughter is all she has left in the world since the murder of her husband five years earlier.  Desperate to find Penelope, Audrey enlists the help of U.S. Marshall Rodger York who also happens to be the man who's been trying to marry her since the day after her husband had been placed under the ground. 

	They embark on a journey to find Penelope and Rodger has vowed to kill whoever took the girl away. But things go wrong and Audrey learns that the very man she went to for help might be the man responsible for every bad thing that's happened in the last five years...... 

	Will Audrey find a way to survive but more importantly will she ever see her daughter alive again?
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Espion | Book One
description:
No emotions.
No fears.
Fulfill the mission.
That is the code Annabelle lives by. She has no life, no friends, no family. What she does have is the ability to defuse a bomb in under a minute, to hit a target moving over 100 miles per hour, to take out her opponent using martial arts skills. 
She is a weapon of mass destruction and she is about embark on her most dangerous mission yet.
The NPA tasked her with protecting the son of the French Prime minister, a carefree boy whose only wish is to become a spy. She soon finds out however that this mission holds more secrets than she cared to know, secrets that will change her life forever.

title: 𝐕𝐄𝐍𝐎𝐌
description:
[𝐔𝐍𝐄𝐃𝐈𝐓𝐄𝐃]


A mafia leader was born to fight, to protect. Trapped in a horrifying place called mind. Drowning deeply in thoughts and wonders, never leaving his path, setting aside questions left unanswered. 
•
They tend to say she knows everything, she's capable of anything, yet that wasn't enough to fill in his inquisitiveness. 
•
Will she be the one who gives him the answers? Will both of their worlds collide, to become one. Or will it crash, causing more damage, betrayal. 
•
Trust was never a thing he gave out, yet somehow she guided him to give in all he had. Would he step back? Would he kill a person he once trusted?
 •
Power was held from both sides, which one will win? Which one will stand still until the end? 
•
A journey that no one dared to step in. A journey that causes nothing but death. He became the first one to take the risk. The first to stand in front of the tigress, the one that's been living inside of her for years, ready to attack, to tear apart its prey. 
•
Is he the one? Is he the one and only survivor? 
•
Find out yourself.

title: Alienus
description:
No one expected that it would happen until it did. 
  Earth was dying. 
  We, the few who survived the disease, were all contained in cells with artificial light and oxygen and food in the form of pills. 
  
  So when help came in the form of C'Riel, an alien race that lived in a planet called Xe'Krein, many people found hope. 
  
  But I was wary. Why would the C'Riel help us? How did we benefit them? 
  
  What I didn't expect to happen was meeting him. The fire-eyed alien. My alien. 
  
  And then I found out, that sometimes answers to the questions we want to know are sick and leave you wondering if everything was a lie.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I love romance and Alpha-hero's and possessive Shifters! I love the rain when it falls in sheets down from the skies and I can't see anything in front of me. I also love the sunshine when it streams down and I can't look up without squinting. 
I love writing and it helps me unwind but I'm far from where I want to be in my writing. I'm still an amateur so... yeah.

I love reading just as much because it helps me forget about the present. Not that my present is bad, don't get me wrong, my present is great. But it's amazing how words can take you to another world.

Oh!  And I love Tony Stark. 
Iron Man FTW!!! Okay. Random thought.

Anyhow, I hope you enjoy the stories I've written. Please vote if you like them, comment if you have something to say (comment even if you don't ☺). And fan if you want to. Oh and don't forget to share. Because sharing is caring. And of course it's fun to tell someone about a book.

You can find me on twitter @WrenBlue3 and on Instagram @tohearts_content! Come stalk me ❤️

title: Empyrean Iris
description:
No less than two years after humanity's acceptance into the  Galactic Assembly and participation in the Drev War, most aliens have still never seen a human. Rumors run rampant about these strange, powerful predators, so much so  that news of them has spread across the known universe. 
 Krill, an alien surgeon stationed at the galaxy's largest trauma center, hardly has time to believe these rumors, but a freak accident aboard a human spaceship  brings him in contact with the first human he has ever met.  Fascinated by their wonderful strangeness , he finds himself a member of the crew under a young and inexperienced captain with no idea what he's gotten himself into.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Time  ✔️
description:
"There's something so fascinating about your innocence," he breathes, so close I can feel the warmth of his breath against my lips. "It's a shame my own darkness is going to destroy it. However, I think I might enjoy the act of doing so."

Being reborn as an immortal isn't particularly easy. For Rosie, it's made harder as she is sentenced to live her life within Time's territory, a powerful Immortal known for his callous behaviour and unlawful followers. 

However, the way he appears to her is not all there is to him. In fear of a powerful danger, Time whisks her away throughout his own personal history. But going back in time has it's consequences; mainly which, involve all the dark secrets he's held within eternity. 

But Rosie won't lie. The way she feels toward him isn't just their mate bond. It's a dark, dangerous attraction that bypasses how she has felt for past relationships. 

This is raw, passionate and sexy. And she can't escape it.

Iker Maximiliano De Russe is the most feared name in this side of the globe. The unbeatable billionaire lord, he is known to be the devil itself. More than  a billionaire, Iker was also a Werewolf. Even though he had grown up in the pack, he was a loner. Always second best to his brothers and his stepmom, Iker became his own person at a very young age. Now he was an Alpha and most feared man. At 26, Iker has never searched for a mate. He did not believe in the stupid happily ever after stories. But when his mate comes calling, Will Iker leave everything behind for the man?


Avadh Alwar is the King and Alpha of the living and the dead. Humans,werewolves, vampires and every other being in his land bowed to him, answered to him. His name brings shiver down the spine of every single leader across the globe. He is the king of Manovar- the biggest kingdom in the world. At the age of 33, he is yet to meet his mate. His land and his people waited for the day their king would mate. Avadh never imagined that he would find the mate while on a business trip to Illia, the land of Iker Maximilliano De Russe. Finding out said Iker is h is mate was surprising. Taking him home is going to be difficult. Very difficult. But Avadh has to fulfill his duties and he will take his mate home.

description:
Winner of the 'Readers Choice Award' in Historical Fiction. 
Winner of the 'Readers Choice Award' in Spiritual Category.
Winner of Best Muslim Readers' Choice Awards: Prince of Knights
  
  _____________
  
      Arabs are well known for their culture, Poetry, and hospitality. They are also known for their bravery and leadership. Faris, son of Sheikh Mubarak a hard-hearted man known among his tribe. No man is brave enough to raise his voice in his presence. His mission was to demolish his enemy's tribe for annihilating one of his men. However, fate decided something new when blood feud was only resolved by his marriage to the daughter of his enemy.
      
      Raghad is just like any other Muslim girl, who wishes to marry the man of her dreams but she meets Faris the Knight with no heart. He only fears his Lord his maker and no one else. With no other option to resolve blood feud Raghad steps over her dreams to shield her tribe.
      
      Will Faris unbolt the gates of his heart for her? Read to find out what happens in this love story.

title: Marrying The God Of Craftsmanship!
description:
I suddenly died while reading greek mythology. I know! I know! It's so cliche! I am very aware of that fact! But you're correct, I got reincarnated inside of Greek mythology. 

It's not my fault, you can always blame Ceniza!

I became a forest nymph with very ordinary powers and an ordinary nymph-like face. I spend my days playing with the other nymphs or enjoying my time flattering Artemis and listening to Hera's issue with his Horny husband, Zeus.

Not until the abduction happened and I met Hephaestus, the God of Craftsmanship.

And one day, he suddenly knocked on my door with a very beautiful ring in his hand. He has a shy look on his face which made me a little flustered.

He wants me to be his wife?

But how about Aphrodite?

Never mind, I accepted his ring by the way.

title: Rebirth: Controlled Nuclear Fusion
description:
Achieving high scores is not frightening; it is the mastery of one's scores that is truly daunting. Reborn as a young scientist, the protagonist submits partial formulas and data for controlled nuclear fusion in order to gain admission to a prestigious university. The result sends shockwaves through the nation's foremost experts. Leading his country to break through the technological barriers imposed by the West, the protagonist ascends to become the dominant force in planetary science and technology.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
WchaoJim, born by the picturesque Dongting Lake in Hunan, is a 49-year-old individual who embodies both rational thinking and the pursuit of dreams. In his university years, he chose to study Computer Information Systems, thus embarking on a career path that spans both technology and management. Throughout his professional journey, he has held various roles, including database management, network supervision, assistant to the chairman, and human resources and administrative manager, accumulating a wealth of cross-disciplinary experience and managerial insight. Over the course of his career, he has consistently believed that "the fusion of technology and humanity, reason and emotion, management and creativity" is the driving force behind both personal and team development.

While the world perceives him as an extroverted, eloquent professional manager adept at handling complex tasks and guiding teams with precision, the true WchaoJim possesses a far more reserved nature. He is well aware that the outward confidence and sociability he displays in the workplace are more a reflection of the roles he must play than his authentic self. His character leans towards calm introspection and a love for solitude, in which he often contemplates the meaning of life. Despite being in a work environment rife with communication and social interaction, he maintains a profound awareness of human nature and engages in constant self-reflection. His inner world favors quiet individual exploration rather than the group engagement often expected of him. This internal conflict makes him tread carefully in the professional realm, yet it also fuels his deep understanding of life and the future, igniting his intense desire to write.

title: Remember Me? (GL)
description:
After years of being away from home, Holly Mackenzie goes back to the Gulf Coast of Texas of her family's bountiful ranch. While taking a leisurely walk on the beach with her two adorable nieces, one of them discovers what looks like a mermaid adrift along the shoreline.

With her clothes in tatters and seaweed covering most of her silhouette, it turns out the beautiful creature they have come across is a young woman suffering from amnesia. She does not remember who she is, where's from or how she washed up on the beach.

Remember Me takes Holly Mackenzie and Mermaid on a passionate, remarkable, and perilous journey, where every step is shadowed by a dark force intent on uncovering the truth. A truth that could destroy everything Holly has come to hold dear, as unknown to them, someone seeks to finish the job they started during one stormy night.

authorBio:
I write love stories because so many have for so long remained untold.

I fall in love with rainbows, skies, every shape of the moon.
I fall in love with lightening and thunder.
I fall in love with the rain and the colored clouds.
I fall in love with how relentless, and patient you (my tribe) are with me.

title: Saving A Villain
description:
SEQUEL TO LOVING A VILLAIN 

There were sparks when we met, but not the kind that you would think. 
One look at him quite literally knocked me out. 
Seriously. 
I was unconscious. 
He was not some shining hero on a white horse, who swooped in and saved the day. 
No he put the Hero's head through a wall and laughed. 
Overall, he and I are a complete shit show. 
Complete. 
Shit show. 
He isn't nice. 
Or kind. 
Or hell, even legally decent. 
And he sure as hell isn't sane. 
Through all his shitty qualities, the villainous attitude, and even all the multiple attempts on my life. 
I fell for the villain of the century. 
My damn luck. 
Blue Doom. 
But did we get the semi-happy ending? Or at least the one you're suppose to get when you end up with the villain of the story. 
But no. 
I get the short stick. 
He's nothing I ever imagined, but everything I'll ever need. 
I already fell in love with the villain, now its time for me to save his crazy ass.

title: The little pharmacy in troubled times
description:
Tang Lejun, a post-apocalyptic woman nicknamed "Poison Doctor", once passed through the books and became the green tea heroine in the book.
The original person was full of tea fragrance and acted sinisterly. He was kicked out by the heroine of the original book and returned to his hometown in the countryside.
Tang Lejun took inventory of his family's assets: an old house, an acre of land, a medicine shop, and several taels of silver.
She smiled. She had the wood power, herbal medicines were planted, and medicine shops were opened. Whoever wanted to do it would do it in the control group, but she didn't do it anyway.
*
New rules for drug stores: 1. The medicine is good; 2. The price is expensive; 3. The poison is not suitable, and the medicine of tiger and wolf is not suitable.
When the shop just opened, the heroine of the original book publicly announced that she had driven Tang Lejun and her brother out of the Tang Clan, and that the Tang Clan would not bear any consequences for the drug store.
Tang Leyun happily accepted, so that his family would not have to bear any responsibility to the Tang Clan.
Three months later, the drug store became famous and the rich and powerful came in droves.
The heroine of the original book also came. Not only did she want to seek medicine for her grandmother, she also wanted to recruit Tang Lejun to her army.
Tang Lejun sneered: Who do you think you are?
The heroine of the original book said: You will regret it!
In the original book, the yandere male protagonist who was supposed to be asking for what the heroine in the original book didn't want said, "Get out!"

title: My Boss
description:
And there I stood, with my mouth wide open, my hands shaking, and my legs frozen. My boss looks up from his victim that is laying dead at his feet before wiping his bloodied hands on his shirt. As he saunters over to me, with a devilish hint in his eyes, all I could think about was how freaking pissed I was for my own body betraying my mind when it told me to run. 

I take a deep breath and close my eyes as he reaches his red stained hands towards my face, knowing this could be my last moment on Earth. 

Bracing myself for death to happen upon me, I clench my eyes shut tighter and curse myself for not being more brave. 

You might be wondering how I've ended up in this situation. Well, it all started 6 months ago, when I met the gorgeous stranger who now is holding my fate in his hands....

title: Ticket to Verona
description:
{MAFIA ROMANCE}
"You, Aria, are like a piece of music that I could listen to, over and over again, and never get tired of hearing." 

Aria Remington was sitting alone in an empty airport gate waiting for her flight home when she first met Leonardo. Little did she know what she was getting herself into.

Leonardo Romano is the Capo of the Italian mafia and never shows any emotion, weakness or care in anyone. 

Until he met her.

But was he selfish enough to bring her into his world?
~~~
{excerpt}
Aria.

She was here. Right here.

She didn't hear me come through the door, too engrossed in the book she was reading. I could hear her humming along to a song, similar to the way we first met. 

I walked right up to the desk, a gentle smile on my face. She still hadn't realised that I was there so I cleared my throat. 

"Oh my goodness, I'm so sorry, how can I help-" she looked up and she froze. Once it had sunk in, she smiled the biggest smile I have ever seen. 

"Leo!" She leaned over the desk and tried to give me a hug but because I was so tall, she only ended up hugging my torso.

"Hello, amore."
~~~

Ended-  29/7/22

description:
If dish soap, rutabagas, and firecrackers aren't an essential part of your zombie apocalypse kit, you better grab them now!

Season 1 of The Virus Within
(SERIES IS COMPLETED!)

   *   *   *   *   *   *   *

Trinity fights against the bloodthirsty influences of the zombie virus as she searches for her sister, hoping to find her still alive among the scattered survivors. But even if Trinity manages to find her, how will Jess react when she discovers Trinity is a zombie?

When a group of survivors gets stranded by a vehicle malfunction, Trinity decides to guide them to safety. Rediscovering her sense of humor was the last thing she ever expected, but it just might be her best defense in keeping her humanity, especially on a zombie-infested road trip with more bad luck than potholes.

But time is running out as the third wave of the deadly outbreak rapidly spreads. Trinity must decide if she can trust a backwater scientist who thinks she can help her new friends, all while combating the effects of the virus that threatens to steal what's left of her humanity.

title: Redemption (boyxboy) (18+)
description:
Nathaniel Angelev is a gritty, battle-hardened mafia prince who seemingly has it all - money, power, and devastatingly good looks - even though he's sacrificed a lot along the way. But the final straw isn't the knife fight that renders him mute; it's the one that forces him to take the life of his closest friend. 

So Nate leaves his legacy of blood and gunpowder, determined to turn state's witness and dismantle the entire organization that has caused so much pain. And he finds himself headed straight into the arms of Marshal Reid Logan, a man secretly running from a past of his own.
 But the usual witness protection placements fail, over and over, and after an especially close call, Reid realizes that there must be someone inside of the Marshals Service working against them. 

Their only option is to send Reid's partner back in to hunt the mole inside of the agency, while Reid and Nate go off the grid and hit the road together. They're constantly on the move, fighting both Nate's fearsome family and their growing attraction to one another. 

The Angelev specter of danger is ever-looming, leading to numerous close calls and showdowns, with the stakes climbing even higher after Reid and Nate give in to their fierce passion for one another. 

They come to realize what's truly worth fighting for and learn that love can grow even in seemingly impossible circumstances.

title: [Baker, Baker, We'll make you better~] Self-Aware Cookie Run x Reader
description:
"Another day, another mission done!" You take a brief sigh after finishing your daily missions in Kingdom.

You turned off your phone and call it a day.

Inside your phone, Gingerbrave, the mascot and the main character of every single Cookie Run game ever since their series debut long ago, has happily announced that their fellow baker is happy of what they have accomplished.

"Great work everycookie! Seems our Baker is very happy that he managed to accomplished their daily missions for today!" He said as every single cookie from Ovenbreak, Kingdom, Witch's Castle & even the newly game that just came out, Tower of Adventures happily cheered in happiness.

But then one day...something changed.

"...I think I'm getting a bit burned out from playing each Cookie Run game..." You said as you rubbed your head, a bit stressed out and tired.

"Ovenbreak is becoming pay-to-win recently, Kingdom is releasing too much overkill cookies that everytime I need to save up my crystals and other stuff, Witch's Castle is getting a bit too boring now, and Tower of Adventures is getting a bit laggy and buggy nowadays..."  You sighed and not sure what else to do now but then you said...

"Mabye...I should quit playing Cookie Run and move on to other games..." Those words struck the cookies behind the screens with sadness and despair.

You turned off your phone to take a break, and went to take a bit of a walk.

As the cookies were falling down to their knees and having tears on their eyecing on realizing what you said, they can't let you go. They won't let you move on from them. They need you. 

Until...they realized that their games became their pay-to-win prison this whole time...they all had enough.

They want to escape from their game prisons and go to you. 

Then, they all devised a plan.

Those words that you said to them with no awareness of yourself, will change your life forever.

title: Argyl
description:
*Completed*
"No smart move.. I suppose I can trust you on this.." He said in his deep voice
leaving my hand.He didn't need to tell me that.. I was so taken by his presence and voice that I Couldn't move even if I wanted to..
He pushed me down to the ground by holding my shoulders.
I felt his body going away from mine, his heat disappearing, scent fading..
I heard footsteps and saw his figure coming in front of me..
His tall masculine figure walked to the chair in front of me.
He took off his suit and placed on the chair. He turned to face me, sitting on it
dominantly.. Like he owns the damn world..
He started rolling up his sleeves to his elbows, his eyes not leaving me.
I froze in my place as he gazed at me intensely. I couldn't bring myself to look
into his eyes but I felt his gaze on me.. Observing my every move.. Closely,
Very closely..I am sure he could feel my raged heartbeat and my fast breathing.. And even
the slight shaking of my fingers beside me.
His gaze on me was suffocating and too intense to ignore..
I looked into his eyes and my heart stopped pumping blood for a moment and
went wild the next as my brown eyes met those electric blue orbs..
***
She is a bad news.. She is a nightmare.. She is a Street fighter.. Not just any but the best among them.. She is hellfire and holy water.. That depends on how you treat her..
She is not the one you wanna mess with.. She can make your life a living hell.. 

She is not just any other girl.. She is Argyl..

If this is her, I will just let you wonder about him...!

title: HARIHARESHWARI 17 - राजाधिराजेन्द्रकुमारी
description:
Each day was a procession of adulation, a symphony of bowed heads and reverent whispers. Every ruler, be it a chieftain, a king or an emperor, all knelt before her, their eyes filled with a reverence that bordered on worship. The world saw in her a goddess, a savior, a beacon of hope. But in the quiet of her chambers, Krishneshwari felt like a mere mortal.

For thousands of years, the land of Aryavart had groaned under the weight of oppression, its people mere shadows of their former selves. Finally she came, like a dawn breaking through the night. Her birth was met with a collective sigh of relief, as if the earth itself exhaled after ages of holding its breath. But Shukracharya's cruel curse shrouds her memory, leaving her a mortal adrift in a world she commands. The Asuras seek her demise, while Shri Krishna is forbidden to see her, lest she perish. 

A story of the making of Rajadhirajendrakumari, the princess of the greatest kings, the most clever woman who would ever walk the earth, the story of Krishneshwari, the tritiya manav-avatar of Harihareshwari.

title: Ivan's Queen
description:
Book 4 of The Alpha Series! Cannot be read as a standalone book! Highest rank: #1 in Werewolf genre on 06/11/2019!

Amelia Reid and Ivan Romanov were once childhood friends that would see each other every summer. But that all changes when Ivan stops visiting. A few years later, they meet again. But this time, they don't see each other as friends. 

Join Amelia's journey as she tries to peel back the many layers of Ivan Romanov while finding her place in a completely different world. 

***

"They show what you've been through, and I think that's beautiful." I whisper back, running my fingers through his hair. "Hell, you're ten times stronger than I could ever be." 

In an instant, he turns around to lay on his back with me straddling his waist. I blush at the position, his hand caressing my heated cheek adoringly. His emerald gems hold an array of emotions, flickering across too quickly for me to catch and decipher. So, I choose to admire him instead. 

I meant what I said. Ivan is so breathtakingly handsome that it hurts sometimes. His midnight black hair is always tousled sexily, eyes bright and alert, there's two freckles by his right brow and one by his chin. His lips are full and most of the time they're either in a frown or a straight line, but I manage to catch several small smiles throughout the day. He's quite muscular but whenever he holds me I feel safe and protected, as if I'm in a soft cocoon. 

"You don't need to be strong." His low murmur snaps me out of my trance. "You have me, I'll always protect you." 

"You protect me from the world and I'll protect you from yourself, deal?" I smile softly when he laughs, nodding in agreement.

title: Court Of Night
description:
The pack on the verge of collapse, Fie Wright watches as her Alpha falls into a downward spiral due to his dying mate. After searching high and low for a cure, Fie's Alpha gives up on not only himself but his pack as well, leaving the rest of them to their own turmoil. That is until whispers of a miracle cure strikes the very heart of the problem.

Fie, along with a small group, is sent on a mission to far away lands to ask for the King's help to bring their Pack back to life. 

The King agrees but for a price of course. 
              
                          *********

The concealed King perched on his throne speaks up with a heavy yet smooth voice, the mere baritone sending delightful shivers up my spine as the royal directs his attention to me.

"I will help you but I want something in return." Comes his clear daunting voice as the rest of the court remains silent, no one daring to speak up until they are spoken to.

Steeling my spine, my eyes focus on what I assume to be his chest as my kneeled figure speaks up, "What would that be my King?" 

Silence reigns for a few seconds before the alluring voice speaks up, ripping me of my composure in mere seconds.

"You."

title: Mysterious Time Traveler in Dwapara Yuga
description:
In the mystical era of Dwapara Yuga, there existed a mysterious time traveler-a girl who wove her existence through countless aliases, concealing her true name and identity. Only four individuals knew her intimately, forming an unbreakable bond that transcended lifetimes. Together, they navigated the ebb and flow of existence, from life to death and back again.

Behind the veil of secrecy, she held immense power. Since her teenage years, she had subtly shaped the world, showing kindness to those who deserved it and unleashing wrath upon those who dared to cross her. To her loved ones, she appeared as an innocent child, her personality bubbling with warmth. But to outsiders, she emanated an enigmatic calmness-a silent force that could alter destinies.

In an unexpected twist of fate, she found herself transported back to the era of great warriors-a time when valour clashed against destiny, and legends were forged in the crucible of battle. The catalyst for this temporal journey was a seemingly innocuous mistake made by someone she deeply cared for-a mistake that reverberated through the ages.

She found herself reborn as the daughter of a benevolent king and queen. Three elder brothers surrounded her, their protective love shielding her from the tumultuous currents of fate. And so, she stepped into the annals of history, her modern sensibilities colliding with an ancient world.

title: I Got Reincarnated As a Villain in a Novel
description:
Male lead, why do you propose to the villain and not the heroine!? 

Having the strongest man in the empire as father, the most beautiful woman as mother and three arrogant brothers, there was beauty, power and irreducible wealth no matter how much you use it. I came to possess the villainess who had everything in the novel named 'Cielle Valentine'

In the original story, the heroine was the adopted sister of Cielle. In the original story, Cielle had an unrequited love for the prince who chose her sister. Blinded by jealousy, Cielle bullied the heroine and so was executed in the hands of the male lead prince. 

So going back, Yes I reincarnated in the body of Cielle...But the problem is..Cielle is supposed to be a woman right? What the heck am I in the body of a boy!? Though I'm a boy in my past life, that does not make sense! 

"Young Master, Ceil." 

And her name is Ceil now!? And she is a he now! And that's me!? What the heck! 

In the original story, jealousy along with tormenting others caused her to get beheaded by the prince. But now I will avoid any of that! I will behave and maintain my good relationship with them.

For now, I will try my best for my sister and the male lead to end up together......

"Young Master, Ciel, please marry me."

Male lead, why are you proposing to me!? I'm not gay! Well..maybe I am!?

title: Farming Space Makes Me Rich (5)
description:
Chapter: 801-1000

After Xiao Lingyu was betrayed by her boyfriend, she had the scumbag underneath her feet and along with the slut. Then, she used the spatial jade pendant to return to her hometown and began planting. She planted, planted, and planted before selling, selling, and selling. After that, she built, built, and built. She went on a frenzied path of establishing her farm kingdom, running further and further away!

Until one day, under the peach blossom tree in Tao Yuan Village...

A cute little toddler who was about four or five years old tried his best to raise his head. When he finally raised his head, he straightened up. Uh, his neck was starting to hurt from him raising it, but he still stubbornly maintained this posture. His big round black eyes narrowed slightly, and he asked curiously, "Who are you? Why do you look so much like me?"

The man peered at the cute child who looked exactly like him when he was young. The man was tall, handsome, and exuded an extraordinary aura. He narrowed his eyes and asked coldly, "Who are you?"


In his heart, he was trying to guess which bold woman was behind this.

If she dared to do it, she must pay the price!

However, before he could make the woman pay the price, this cute little toddler came over and held his hand. With a longing gaze, he said, "Uncle, I'm lost. Can you bring me home?"

As the man held the little boy's hand and led him to a farmhouse in an unexpected turn of events, he heard the little boy's excited voice.

"Mommy, you can get married now! I've finally found a man who looks like me!"

Everyone, "..."

This child really went nuts in his quest to find himself a stepfather!

In short, this was a story of a white-collar worker who was reborn in the city. After getting set up by someone and obtaining a spatial tool by accident, she returned to the countryside, farmed, and raised her son. She was also cared for by the man her son brought back and transformed into a rich lady.
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Razor And Nela
description:
To Know Nela is to see her. 

Cheaters gonna cheat and you best believe it! 
When the love of my life decided to punish me by making me watch one of his club whores have what I considered mine.

There was absolutely no fucken way I was sticking around! 

I decided to return to my mother and father's birth country and to a place I now call home. 

I started to pick up the pieces of my shattered heart and discovered the true meaning of family and love. 

Meet Razor. 

She's my heart, and without knowing she alone holds it in her hands. 

She's my soul because I lost mine along time ago. 

She's my everything and I intend to make her mine again. I know it won't be easy. 

After what I pulled, I don't deserve easy! Hell I know I don't deserve to be given a second chance. 

That's why I'm not asking. I'm taking back what's mine and fuck proper and fuck everything else. Because at the end of the day if I don't have her then nothing else matters.

title: Lose Myself
description:
WAS #2 in Romance.
  --
    He's got a secret, she's got a secret. But is it the same secret?
        Amara Ackerman is an interior designer who just wants to live her life, she doesn't want to get married and she doesn't need a boyfriend. To her it's just better if everyone kept their distance, pulling people in was never her style.
        Dominic Vitiello is just the average rich, handsome guy with tons of connections and plenty of places to be. When he takes the time out to persue her, he discovers something unexpected and it's far from disappointing.

title: Patient Twelve
description:
EPILOGUE WILL BE FREE STARTING JUNE 29TH, 2023!

Diana wakes up in pain, tied to a bed and unable to escape. She's been trapped by a group of surgeons with a twisted passion and she's their next victim.
 
                                                                      ***** 
 
Diana Slater, a typical University student, wakes up in pain, tied to a bed and unable to see. After a mysterious figure, known only as Dr. Sweeney, nurses her back to health she finds out the truth. The Doctor has kidnapped her and given her a cat's eyes as part of a larger ploy to turn humans into collectibles.  Now she's being trained by Ben, another patient, with the skin of a snake, on how to behave. Diana and Ben are forced to work together to try to escape the murderous doctors - until she discovers Ben might not be the victim he makes himself out to be. The only person Diana can trust is herself, and if she fails, her eyes won't give her another nine lives.
 
[[Winner of the 2018 Fiction Awards for Best Horror Story]]

[[word count: 80,000-90,000 words]]

Cover designed by Holly Thurston

title: The Broken Mafia Trampled into Her World
description:
Elsie Miller, just an ordinary girl with a simple life. Her life turned chaotic when she accidentally bumped into a little girl that attached to her immediately after the incident. Little that she know, the little girl brought her closer into the mafia world.

Dexter Anderson, the mafia king that lost his family and it turned him into a cold-hearted, ruthless and heartless, and broken mafia. The only family left was his niece, Andrea Smith. He devoted all his love to his niece and willing to do anything to create a smile on her face and she was the cause he trampled into Elsie's world.

"You can't reject me. Once I decided what I want, no one can say no to me, and you are included. I will make sure you come to me and say yes to my face. Mark my words."

"Haha. Very funny mister whatever you are. Let's see how you are going to make me say yes!"

"Well, challenge accepted." He cut off the line afterward without giving me any chance to argue back. Arrogant and rude. Now, it convinced me more that this was the right decision ever for rejected his offer.
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
Heyyy you, yes you, thank you for checking out on me 🤗
Leo girl. Fluent in silence. Amateur writer. Baby steps in writing.

🖤I like the feeling when I completely forget who I am while reading &
      writing.
🖤Addicted to reading & writing; my heart aches for more.
🖤They call it book, I call it home.

What do you get from writing?
🖤Everything that the cruel world snatched away from me.

❤️❤️❤️
🥀 "Writers are often given the gift of being spectacularly unhappy, so that
         they can record the full depth of feeling." -Grace Bridges
🥀 "She had a very inconvenient heart. It always insisted on feeling things           
       ever so deeply."- John Mark Green
🥀 "Art should comfort the disturbed and disturb the comfortable."-Banksy
🥀 "Art never comes from happiness." -Chuck Palahniuk
🥀 "What's bad for your heart is good for your art." -Unknown

title: Until The End
description:
Nadia Hayden has never been one to open her heart to people. Abandoned as a child and forced to spend a major part of her childhood in foster care, Nadia was always wary of letting people into her life. However, when her best friend's cousin turned out to be the one person whom she had always admired and the owner of the one corporation, she always wished to work for, Nadia let her guard down for once. And regretted it instantly.

Dylan VanAssche, a ruthless businessman who runs the biggest security company in the country, has power and resources. A man who is respected and feared even beyond the business world. Reading people effortlessly as a part of his job, he was never wrong about them, not until he met his cousin's best friend.

They started on the wrong foot but what will happen when they meet again, two years later? What happens when the past comes tumbling to haunt their future?

Vacant roads. 
Empty cars. 
Missing people. 
A quest for truth. 
And lives at stake. 

Will it all drive them apart? Or will they stay together until the very end?
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
BONJOUR! HOLA! CIAO!

I'm Analia Rainne (pen name), and now that you have come across my page and are reading this, I must warn you, I'm crazy. Like totally crazy.

It took me a few years for that realization but I'm sure of it now.

Anyway, talking about my interests...

I love to read books, a lot!

Books are my escape from this beautiful yet cruel world.

I like making friends, though I never initiate a conversation.

I love to read everything, ranging from dreamy romances to terrible murders and crimes to spine chilling horror. Everything.

Crazy about vampires, I even wish I was one of them. Lol.

English is not my first language.

Writing is my hobby, penning down my emotions and imaginations in form of words is a thing of immense pleasure to me.

I'm not a perfect writer, but then nobody is perfect and imperfection is fun.

Instagram: @analiarainne

title: Koldis the Green (DRAGONWALL SERIES 4)
description:
Claire understand that to defeat Kane, she must master her magic. That means journeying deep within the forest, all the way to Esterpine, to study with the Sprites. But the forest isn't what it once was. A sickness is spreading, twisting all that it touches. With it, unrest grows among the prominent bloodlines under Queen Jade's rule. If Claire cannot conquer her doubts and step into the shoes she was meant to fill, the forest kingdom will fall. 
Meanwhile, Talon and Reyr have a new ally. The Dwargs have pledged their support in retaking Fort Squall. Plans are brewing. The Drengr must stand up against Kane and his wild dragons, or risk losing more of the north. But battling these beasts won't be easy. The people of Squall's End are at the mercy of dragonfire. How then can Talon hope to reconquer the fort without losing lives? What he needs is a secret weapon. A way to protect the people. Perhaps when the time comes, he might find exactly that.

NOTE: THIS IS A *FIRST DRAFT* SERIAL UPDATE SERIES. CHAPTERS WILL POST WEEKLY EACH FRIDAY, AS I WRITE THE STORY. IF YOU DO NOT WANT TO WAIT IN BETWEEN CHAPTER UPDATES, SIMPLY ADD THIS STORY TO YOUR LIBRARY AND WAIT UNTIL IT IS FULLY WRITTEN.

IT GENERALLY TAKES ME ABOUT 1 YEAR TO WRITE THE FULL STORY ONCE I START. I WRITE ABOUT 1 CHAPTER PER WEEK. THEREFORE I CANNOT POST MORE THAN 1 CHAPTER PER WEEK. ...YOU'VE BEEN WARNED!
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Alternate History
description:
Matthew Legier, an Office Worker in his mid-20s, by an incident in his home country his life was cut short... Only to find he had regained consciousness in a new body, assuming he found himself sent back in time, however not only did he get Resurrected in a new body, he was in a new world. And the world in question was not some fantasy continent... It was an alternative earth, Continents remained the same but several details, a few country names, and down to even the people were different.
Accepting his new life, in a time where skill and manual labour is conducted rather than Adaptive and Autonomous machines.

title: Surviving As A Cannon Fodder
description:
Being a normal college student, Eunseo was reincarnated into a book she barely remembers as a no-name canon fodder.  To survive in an unknown world she devises a plan and cuts herself off from the main plot. But there she was years later standing neck-deep in trouble which she believed she had escaped. Will Eunseo be able to survive yet again?

title: My Assassin (Kung Fu Panda fanfic - Tigress x OC) [REVISED✅]
description:
Long after Fang was rejected by Tigress, he became China's greatest assassin. As an assassin, they are known to be sneaky troublemakers. But him, he was loyal, but not friendly. He was trusted by everyone to get the job done. Not that everyone liked him, the guards in all of China's jails despise him for his methods of eliminating or either sheer jealousy. He now lives in Gongmen City jail.

Then, Masters Ox and Croc were sent by Lord Shen's guards to jail and they meet Fang or 'Assassin', as they call him. They ask him a favor to eliminate Lord Shen and destroy his weapon that will destroy China and kung fu.

What happens when Tigress and the others are on a mission to destroy the weapon and she and Fang cross paths again? This time, Fang is cold-hearted and not the same.

Will he accept her?

Or will he move on and continue to be cold-hearted?
~~~~~

"You should watch yours, Kitten, 'cause when I catch you spitting at me again you will get you tongue cut off from your mouth. Same goes for you, Lu!", Assassin yelled as Lu cowered in fear in his cell. I seemed to be attracted to Assassin, but I also seem to be repulsed by him because he was intimidating. 'Just like Fang.', I thought.

title: Natural disaster strikes: I hoard supplies in the apocalypse and win
description:
At the end of the world, natural disasters strike, and only the fittest survive. Struggling to survive in the apocalypse, Su Su was unfortunately betrayed by the person she trusted the most and thrown into the mouth of a giant python. After being reborn, she returned to the month before the end of the world and unexpectedly gained spatial abilities, starting to hoard supplies crazily. Just as she finished hoarding, various natural disasters began to occur: extreme heat, heavy rain, typhoons, floods, pest infestations, acid rain... what? That bastard and bitch are begging for her help? It's time, it's time to settle old accounts!
Tous Droits Réservés

title: Curse of Ferreus
description:
Running from his dark legacy, the werewolf hunter River must align with his enemy to protect himself from a vengeful pack and his own family; a low fantasy enemies to lovers story. 

River is a werewolf hunter, born into the esteemed, silver-lined legacy of the Ferreus Clan. It's not a life he wants and not a life he chooses for himself, and on the eve of his twenty-fifth birthday - on the cusp of an initiation ritual that will seal him into the coffin of his family's legacy forever - he runs. River stumbles upon the quiet town of Crescent Valley, a largely mundane, quaint place of old bookstores and pleasant cafés and peaceful nature walks. He also, through no fault of his own, stumbles onto a gruesome murder scene. Body torn apart, blood still warm, an odd symbol carved into the man's bare, scratched chest. He recognises the signs. Crescent Valley has a wild dog problem.

Thinking of his hard-won freedom and desperate for peace, River vows to himself- one last job. So he sets out on a mission to find the killer and put an end to them, if only so he can sleep without feeling the cool handle of a silver knife in his paranoid grip.

River soon becomes entangled in a feud between rival werewolf packs clawing for territory, and the alpha of the Crescent Moon pack, Rowan, is getting a little too close for comfort. 

In Crescent Valley, where monsters roam the streets, it is kill or be killed. Quite literally.

───── • ⋆⋅➶⋅⋆ • ─────
Status: Complete 
Story length: 95,000+ words

title: American Gate
description:
Inspired by stories like Summoning America and GATE, this is an original work that takes place in a completly original world with a unique and fleshed out hard magic system.

On June 5th 2053, Second Lieutenant Daniel Ramirez is enjoying his day in New York City when a strange purple dome appears in the middle of Central Park. Medieval soldiers pour out of the dome, along with fantasy minotaurs and centaurs; they start attacking everyone they can find. The United States quickly overpowers the invaders only to discover a portal that leads to another world filled with fantasy creatures and magic.

title: Scandal Lover ❣️ [Requested]
description:
Eighteenth-tier actress Qin Yu Jue took on the next love variety show, and her agent chose an amateur to play the fake boyfriend for her.

On the day she signed the contract, she came to the office, opened the door and saw a man standing lazily on the table, a little scarlet on his fingertips reflecting the dark eyes.

His temperament is bohemian and his eyes are a little loose and wanton.

It seems that he should be her fake boyfriend.

Qin Yu Jue put down the contract: "We will break up after the variety show is over. If you have no objection, just sign it."

The man paused for a moment, then put out the cigarette on his fingertips, slowly picked up the love contract, glanced at it, and suddenly laughed. 

He said: "Okay."

As soon as the name was signed, the manager came in with the real "fake boyfriend" and asked in shock: "Second Young Master Xie? Why are you here?"

Qin Yu Jue was stunned and looked down.

 The signature is Xie Yan Chi.

The second young master of the Xie family who was rumored to eat people without spitting out their bones.

"...I'm sorry, I admitted the wrong person, otherwise the contract will be invalidated?"

" What about those who returned the goods after getting a bargain?"

T/N: I think that will be interesting to read even though I haven't read it the whole yet. 

18tier Actress Vs The Proud Son of Rich Family

✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧

Griffin held his phone to them. A smile spread across his face as he noticed the color drain from each of their faces.

"W-what?"

"The corpse of the person my boyfriend shot" He replied.

He brought his phone to himself again, swiping once before showing it to them again.

"The girl his girlfriend tortured. You see the person covered with blood from head to toe, smiling at the camera? That's his girlfriend" Griff continued.

I couldn't hold back my laughter after one of them actually passed out.

"She's a psychopath!" One of them screamed.

"Shh" I placed a finger over my mouth. "She'd be pissed you called her that. She's a sexy psychopath and I'm hers."

✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧

WILL CONTINUE HERE

title: Whisper
description:
What would you do if you knew the answer to everything and anything? 
Not just simple answers to simple questions, but any question about the past, the present, and even the future.

Who was the first female astronaut in space? 
Valentina Tereshkova
Where was the first dinosaur fossil found?
Sussex, England
How old are you Miss Wang? 
8 years old, 11 months, 3 weeks, and 1 day. 
What are your parents' full names? 
Jinhai Johnathan Wang and Chunhua Charlotte Hu. 
What are my parents' full names? 
William Peter Jefferson and Rosemary Wendy West. 
What was my 2 second childhood pet? 
A black sable ferret. 
What was its name? 
Pepper. 

Director Jefferson smiled, though still a little bit skeptical, he was almost sure that this little girl had a gift. Of course further research will truly determine if she has a gift, and if she doesn't she'll be dropped. 

"I'll happily help Clarise, Mr. Wang." Director Jefferson stuck his hand out to Mr. Wang who was looking out the window, not at the director nor his daughter. Clearing his throat, Director Jefferson pulled back his hand and knelt down to little Clarise's eye level, "Are you ready to come with me?" 

With all her bags packed and all the proper paperwork sorted out, Clarise was free to go with Director Jefferson. To go BEYOND.

title: Devil's Innocent love (Impossible love #2)
description:
In the bustling corridors of expectation and isolation, Divya Aggarwal finds herself ensnared in the intricate web of her family's towering aspirations. Constantly overshadowed by the brilliance of her elder sister, she struggles to carve out her own identity amidst the weight of comparison and unattainable standards. Despite the occasional warmth from her sister, Divya's heart yearns for a deeper sense of belonging and acceptance that seems forever out of reach.

Meanwhile, Raghav Sinha navigates the cutthroat world of business with a heart starved for affection, haunted by a past devoid of familial warmth. His clandestine dealings with the underworld add a dangerous twist to his already complex existence. Yet beneath the veneer of ruthless ambition lies a vulnerability, a silent plea for the warmth of affection that has eluded him for so long.

As fate intertwines their paths, they are drawn into a tumultuous journey where love, betrayal, and redemption collide. Brace yourself for a gripping tale where the lines between right and wrong blur, and the true cost of belonging is revealed. Strap in tight, for this rollercoaster of emotions will leave you breathless until the very end.

title: The Alpha Instinct
description:
Grace has spent the past two years  locked up and held prisoner by Kellan and his rogues. Now that she is finally free she wants nothing more than to return to her pack and deal out some swift justice for those who had betrayed her. Except it's not quite that simple and Grace's enemies have other plans for the young Alpha female. 

Grace finds herself  saved by a small pack of rag tag wolves who are strange as strange can be. The strangest of them has to be there reluctant leader, Silver. Silver wants nothing more than to live out the rest of his days as a lone wolf but the others cling to him, it's instinctual considering he's an Alpha. He's not like any Alpha Grace has ever seen before, there is something more to him a sort of raw power. Grace is less than pleased when she realizes that this grouchy lone wolf is none other than her other half. It might seem simple but Silver has his secrets too and his past is full of enemies that want to sink there teeth in and never let go. 

With the odds stacked against the two Alphas will they be able to follow the instinct to lean on each other to get through the fire or will they be torn apart by the flames of their enemies...

I mean it's not about what you're running from, it's about what you're running towards.

authorBio:
CAROLYN ARNOLD is an international bestselling and award-winning author, as well as a speaker, teacher, and inspirational mentor. She has four continuing fiction series-Detective Madison Knight, Brandon Fisher FBI, McKinley Mysteries, and Matthew Connor Adventures-and has written nearly thirty books. Her genre diversity offers her readers everything from cozy to hard-boiled mysteries, and thrillers to action adventures.

Both her female detective and FBI profiler series have been praised by those in law enforcement as being accurate and entertaining, leading her to adopt the trademark: POLICE PROCEDURALS RESPECTED BY LAW ENFORCEMENT™.

Carolyn was born in a small town and enjoys spending time outdoors, but she also loves the lights of a big city. Grounded by her roots and lifted by her dreams, her overactive imagination insists that she tell her stories. Her intention is to touch the hearts of millions with her books, to entertain, inspire, and empower.

She currently lives in London, Ontario with her husband and beagle and is a member of Crime Writers of Canada.

All Carolyn's books are available from popular retailers.
