title: Lekha (Completed)
description:
Lekha is an orphan who has quite a fascination for all things connected with Rajasthan(India). The fascination comes to life as she is pulled into the century when the Mughals and Rajputs are in a tussle over Rajwara (Rajasthan of today). The story is from the point of view of a spectator who although involved still can look from an outsider's perspective.
But what would happen if the spectator becomes the participant and has to take the most important decision of her life. Would she go with the flow and close the gates to her previous life or would she rather make a run for it towards the exit .
Tous Droits Réservés
authorBio:
I am a great fan of all historical romance fiction. Especially the ones with 'happy endings'. I hardly get to see any novel based on the Indian culture. So started one of my own 'Lekha- a kaleidoscopic journey'. I tried to capture with my words as much as I could  about the old Rajput culture in my book. Though its from the perspective of a viewer on the sidelines. The era of Mughal and Rajput strife had lots of political angles to it , but my story revolves more around the usual life of a semi-commoner. Its has a love angle to it (that I love so much :) ).
Please do read it and comment.


Disclaimer: Pictures and videos I have posted in my chapters do not belong to me. I have googled them out just to make my readers understand the small details I have written better. If anyone has any problem with my using them and claims it as their copyright , they can always contact me and I will remove it. The pictures are just for examples and are not going to be used for any commercial purpose. Thanks.

authorBio:
https://twitter.com/RaFranc0
https://www.facebook.com/RA-Franco-975473935857741/

I do a little thing call writing. Writing is my passion, my escape, my obsession. It drives me to the brink sometimes, but always pulls me back.


I have serious qualms with sharing my work, it is so personal to me. I would sooner hand my diary over to someone than a book I'd written. so I will post anonymously.

I'm here to make myself a better writer and because I'm yearning to be read. I thrive on productive criticism. Meaning don't tell me "your books sucks" tell me WHY it sucks. What can I do to make it better? What parts did you really like and what we're you not so impressed with?  If you see grammatical or spelling errors doesn't hesitate to politely point them out so I can correct them. I put on my big girl panties when I write so I won't get butt hurt over corrections or suggestions.

Anything I post on here will be novel length. I don't do short stories, things will probably be no shorter than 50-60k words.


As far as reading requests go I'm not going to say I'm open to them, because I don't really have the time to read every wattpad story. If you're someone who has started a story, clicked on every popular artist's profile and asked for a read, I'm probably going to ignore you.
If you're someone who has voted on my stories, or commented from time to time, or taken the time to message me or something at some point or another, I probably will.
I say probably because if I say definitely and I forget, or simply don't find the time then I'm a liar and I hate liars.
But I seriously do respect how hard it is to get readers, I know my stories would be no where without you guys, so if your one of my loyal readers I'll try to return the favor.
Try as in I'm seriously forgetful and busy, but I'll add it to my library and try to remember to go through the first few chapters to see if it catches my attention. But I make absolutely no promises.

FLY EAGLES FLY

title: Please spare me, Villain!
description:
Imagine, just for a second, let's imagine you end up somehow travelling into your favourite book. 

Then you started working your magic and you cosy up to the male lead who was supposed to get you killed or you make the demon lord fall in love with you so he can protect you from your imminent death. 

And woah you got your happy ending. 

But now let's imagine a completely different scenario where you end up in a book you read like 10 pages of (including the ending). 

And you find yourself literally dropped into the lap of a psychopathic rival who enjoys just a teeny bit of bloodshed. He's also the guy who killed your favourite character and not to mention you. 

But then you hold on for a second because you realise you're not dead and he wants to use you as an immortal tool to sharpen his aim. 

Well that's the story I ended up living in. And I've got one request from Mr. Villain over there, please spare me!
Tous Droits Réservés

title: His Property
description:
"Shh," He whispers in her ear, and she closes her eyes at the sensation of his breath against her neck. "I've got you, kitten."

The pet name sends shivers down her body, as she squirms in his hold. 
Her body reacted to his touches while her mind wanted her to get away from him.

"If I remove my hand, are you going to scream?" He asks in his husky voice, the violence lurking in his tone.

'I should,' is her first thought. But she shakes her head, like the fool she is.

"Good girl."

***

A young woman must compete in a deadly televised competition, Grimm Games, to ensure her twin sister survives.

Season 1 of Grimm Games 

*****               

When twenty-year-old social activist Kam Wendall discovers her name among the contestants of the deadly television competition Grimm Games, she's stunned to realize her estranged twin sister, Millie, has stolen her identity to compete. 

Determined to save her sister, Kam enters the contest. At a secret and isolated location, they compete against others through nightmarish sets, perilous escape rooms, and sinister puzzles, and must outsmart the sadistic Grimm entities stalking them. 

Amidst the twisted challenges, can Kam and Millie rebuild their fractured trust all while evading the diabolical forces at play? And would even that be enough to help them survive the Grimm Games and emerge victorious?

title: The Ruthless Mafia King's Posession|18+|
description:
WARNING: MATURE CONTENT!!!

★Be careful who you trust. Because, even your bestfriend can also become your greatest enemy★

Don't come close to me !" I yelled on top of my lungs, taking two step backwards. 

My gaze fixated on his hand, dripping with blood. He had just cut off a man's hands like it meant nothing. What kind of human is he? No! No! No! He is no human, he is an animal. A bloody filthy animal.

"I won't hurt you, baby girl." He took a couple of step towards me and I kept moving backwards, until my rear back collided with the wall, trapping me with him.

I whimpered in fear. Unable to utter a single word as his bloodied hand caressed my chin. Somebody please save me! I cried inwardly. 

"You're so fucking beautiful." He complimented me but I returned the favor by spitting on his face. 

"And you're an animal!" I retorted. 

He wiped his face with his bloody hand. Then, he shot me a daunting glare. I braced myself for what could come next. I was ready to bear the brunt of my action. He could run a slap across my face. or perhaps, he might even kill me too. But instead, his handsome face brightened with a devilish smirk and he claimed my lips.

-----★----★----★----★----★-


Janie's father took her to a big mansion under the guise of going there to borrow money for her tuition fee. Unknown to her, he was actually going to sell her to the ruthless, dangerous and heartless mafia king, Luciano Pavarotti. 


She found out that same day, that the man whom she believed to be her father, whom she trusted all her life wasn't really who she thought he was. Her father just betrayed her!


what happens after Janie suffers that betrayal from her father? How will she cope living with the most dangerous person on Earth as his possession? 


Find out more from this suspense filled mafia romance novel on Janie and Luciano journey. 


Not for readers below the age of eighteen!

authorBio:
Hello, friends! How are you all doing? 🌟

A little about me? I'm a finance student with a knack for imagination and a love for languages! I find joy in unraveling the complexities of the financial world just as much as I adore indulging in creative pursuits.

Writing is my escape-a stress-buster that fuels my overactive mind and lets my thoughts take flight. That said, don't expect frequent updates from me. Like many of you, I juggle a busy life in the real world.

Genres that captivate me? Romance, mystery, adventure, fiction, fantasy, and historical tales-they're all close to my heart.

Feel free to drop by and share your world with me!

authorBio:
NO REQUESTS AT THE MOMENT PLEASE! I'm working on a big boy story!

...

Hello, lovelies. It's OneArtsyGamer03.
It's good to see you all again.

My original account was deleted/banned by Wattpad. This account is to try to rebuild, but I will also be starting up on Archive of Our Own just in case I get struck down again by Wattpad. I didn't want our community to end like it did. It sucks, but... we can rebuild.

I still have writing left in me. I'm not going down so easily.

So! Here we are! I've managed to republish every story (except for one or two that I haven't worked on in a while) and I'm finally starting up new stories! :D ❤️

Currently there will be NO requests open! I am currently working on a BIG BOY story for Arthur Morgan, and that will no doubt take up to a year to complete! I might do a story or two while taking breaks from it, so if I do, then I might ask for requests! <3

authorBio:
Writer. Artist. Semi-functioning Workaholic.

There isn't much else to sum me up besides I don't like pineapple on pizza (but you do you) and Tobey Maguire will always be my spidey (but Tom Holland can get it).

All my books are not fully edited, and I started writing when I was 14 which was a decade ago... so you can say the evolution on my writing goes crazy. Read for the humor and stay for the occasional cringe. Join by following me to become one of my amazing readers I like to call my lovelies.

As The Doctor stated, in 900 years of time and space, I've never met anybody who wasn't important.

So if anyone hasn't told you this yet, you're important, your time is important, and any book you read of mine means the world to me.

Common Questions I'll quickly answer...

-Yes I'm Kenyan (Kikuyu), and extend a sincere welcome to all my fellow Kenyans who stumble upon my work. Don't tell the elders now ;)
-The check marks in the title of my works mean they're complete
-BWWM stands for Black Woman White Man, I do still write interracial stories, I just haven't written a heterosexual interracial story in a little bit
-I don't have a schedule for anything unless I'm getting paid for it. Chapters get written and books get done whenever the universe sees fit. If y'all don't f*ck with that, run me a check. Biz email is down below
-My astrology: Gemini Sun, Scorpio Moon, Libra Rising
-ENTJ
-Ravenclaw, but it's still f*ck JK Rowling till I die (and while the shit she said about trans folks was complete dog shit, I'm pissed off with how comfortable this woman is at just lying unprovoked about her writing. Like JK Rowling doesn't even remember what's in her own books anymore at this point)

title: Betrothed to Jack Frost (REWRITTEN)

Elle grew up believing that myths and magic were confined to the realm of make-believe, never suspecting she was part of a hidden world of wonder and danger. On the night of her twenty-first birthday, Elle's ordinary life shatters when she uncovers an ancient prophecy that entwines her fate with every fairy tale ever told-she must marry the malevolent god, Jack Frost.

Suddenly thrust into a realm where immortal gods and monsters reign, Elle is forced to navigate a world she never knew existed. Reluctantly, she must ally with Jack, a man she is desperate to avoid. Neither of them is thrilled about the impending marriage, but as dark plots and secrets emerge, Elle and Jack find themselves drawn together by forces beyond their control.

With threats mounting and fate closing in, Elle must confront her destiny, knowing that defying it could lead to her demise. As they stand united against a world of peril, Elle must find the courage to face a future that seems to offer only one grim outcome: death.

title: Choosing Wrong
description:
*****
My words were cut off and I was suddenly backed up into a wall, facing a very angry Logan. He looked me down in fury, making my size shrink even more with the way he intimidates me. I returned my gaze to the floor, trying to focus on anything other than his mesmerising eyes. His breath fanned my face by the closeness of our bodies and he lifted my face to his with the tip of his fingers.
"Listen here princess. You will do what I tell you to or I will shoot your pretty little face right now." 
*****
Logan Miller is the CEO of Miller insutries. A multinational company recognised by the world. Logan built his company from scratch, and with increasing profits, came an increasing fame and ego. Ruthless and powerful he gets everything he wants in just the flick of his fingers. However, what people don't know about him is that he is also the leader of the biggest criminal organization of the United States of America. 
Emily Dufon moves to NYC after a terrible heartbreak for a new start. Getting a job in Miller industries at the IT department she is utterly content with her new beggining. 
But what happens when after a long day she stumbles upon something that can change her life forever? What is the real cost of being in the wrong place at the wrong time? 
Read to find out:)

title: Farming Space Makes Me Rich (4)
description:
Chapter: 601-800

After Xiao Lingyu was betrayed by her boyfriend, she had the scumbag underneath her feet and along with the slut. Then, she used the spatial jade pendant to return to her hometown and began planting. She planted, planted, and planted before selling, selling, and selling. After that, she built, built, and built. She went on a frenzied path of establishing her farm kingdom, running further and further away!

Until one day, under the peach blossom tree in Tao Yuan Village...

A cute little toddler who was about four or five years old tried his best to raise his head. When he finally raised his head, he straightened up. Uh, his neck was starting to hurt from him raising it, but he still stubbornly maintained this posture. His big round black eyes narrowed slightly, and he asked curiously, "Who are you? Why do you look so much like me?"

The man peered at the cute child who looked exactly like him when he was young. The man was tall, handsome, and exuded an extraordinary aura. He narrowed his eyes and asked coldly, "Who are you?"


In his heart, he was trying to guess which bold woman was behind this.

If she dared to do it, she must pay the price!

However, before he could make the woman pay the price, this cute little toddler came over and held his hand. With a longing gaze, he said, "Uncle, I'm lost. Can you bring me home?"

As the man held the little boy's hand and led him to a farmhouse in an unexpected turn of events, he heard the little boy's excited voice.

"Mommy, you can get married now! I've finally found a man who looks like me!"

Everyone, "..."

This child really went nuts in his quest to find himself a stepfather!

In short, this was a story of a white-collar worker who was reborn in the city. After getting set up by someone and obtaining a spatial tool by accident, she returned to the countryside, farmed, and raised her son. She was also cared for by the man her son brought back and transformed into a rich lady.

title: Dark Queen: The Cybelline Prophecies
description:
A 21st century covert ops agent, Cybelline found herself transported to a medieval world of magic and war without a clue of how she got there. 

Fine, she'll consider this as early, early retirement, ignore that she's now turned into a 12 year old, and try to have a quiet, peaceful life. 

Maybe she would buy a farm and raise some ducks. She didn't plan to have royalty fall over her doorstep and demand marriage for "taking his innocence". 

Granted, she tripped him first, but he deserved it.

If her idyllic life had been undisturbed, she could even ignore the war between humans, the Fae, and the Folk. If they had left her alone, perhaps she would have never discovered power so potent that it could destroy the world. Perhaps she would have never become the most feared person in the realm.

authorBio:
Thank you all for visiting my profile or reading my books! Writing is a creative endeavor that I love and getting to hear from readers has been a great experience. 

My philosophy on writing: 

Writing or creating a product is like allowing a little piece of yourself to go off into the world. Once it's out there, it's hard to get it back. It should stand on its own. My hope is to take the lessons in experience and allow the room for growth. Remain objective and remain creative. 

My favorite quote: 
Compromise where you can. Where you can't, don't. Even if everyone is telling you that something wrong is something right. Even if the whole world is telling you to move, it is your duty to plant yourself like a tree, look them in the eye, and say 'No, you move'.  Peggy Carter

9 out of 10 times you'll find me at home, basking in the warmth of my cozy bed watching Netflix, accompanied by my two beloved feline companions, Chester and Arya.

I grapple with a condition known as 'Maladaptive Daydreaming,' which translates to a mind that frequently embarks on journeys of vivid and fantastical scenarios. In simpler terms, my imagination operates in overdrive. To channel this creative energy, I've discovered the perfect outlet - storytelling. Through my stories, I aim to explore the dynamics of relationships, strength, and vulnerability, offering a glimpse into worlds where love and courage intersect in profound and inspiring ways.

title: ZEUS
description:
TRAILER IN CHAPTER 1

#1 Memories 10/10/2019
#1 Hurt 27/09/2019
#1 Werewolf 04/07/2019
#1 Blind 09/02/2020
#1 Time 10/06/2020

There are three of them
They are ruthless
They are cursed
They are Immortal
They are the HellHounds.
******
They were a legend. A story. But all legends are based off of truth. 
"Don't go out after dark," My father said. 
"Don't go anywhere alone," My father said
"Don't go deep into the woods, for that is where he waits," My father said.
I never broke a rule. I was a good girl. But my question always was, what do I do when the monster comes out to play? 

***
I was blind, so I slowly walk forward, not knowing where he is exactly. But I use my senses. I let this connection pull into a direction. As I slowly walk ,I reach my hand out, "Where are you?" I asked quietly. 

A big and calloused hand touches my own. From that one touch, electric shocks courses through my body, a strange and warming sensation. I flinched and gasped in fright. The big and strong hand gently grabs mine and softly pulls me forward. A breath hits my face slightly. I was right in front of him. He leans down toward my ear, his lips almost touching it. His breath makes chills run over my neck as he whispers very quietly with a deep and rough voice, "Here I am."

***

If you want this book to make sense to you, I would suggest you read Book 2 of my Blood Moon Pack series, it completed and ready to read.  You can still read this as stand alone, however there is more information held in Book 2.

title: Unraveling Him | A mafia Story
description:
(Book #4 in the series) 
(Can be read as a stand-alone) 

HER 

A mystery. 
So very complicated. 
An enigma. 
A puzzle with so many missing pieces. 
Add one of the above ingredients into my plate and call me intrigued. 

Enter him. He is all of them and more...much more. 

He claims to be a monster. 
He doesn't believe in redemption. 
He is too vague and too dark for me to read.

But it's my job now. To help him, figure him out, to find all of his missing pieces, arrange them together and finally obtain the final picture. 
It's my job, to find his deepest darkest secret. 
It's my job, to unravel the beast he claims to be and finally see the man behind. 



HIM 

Lost. 
I've been lost for way too many years. 
I thought it was over. I wanted it to be over. I had nothing to live for anymore. 
I've killed, I've destroyed and obliterated.  It was enough. My role in the story should've ended there. 
I was too big of a monster to be tamed. Too dangerous to be kept alive. 

Enter her. 
Too loud. Too obnoxious. Too naive. 
Innocent, so very innocent. 
So intent on aiding me, redeeming me. 
She is unaware, she is opening a door that was shut down with a broken lock. 

I am scared. Terrified even. 
She is too white against my inner darkness. 
Too pure to be tangled with the devil living within me. 
We don't mix. We should never mix. 

Instead of pulling me out of that room, she might just get herself stuck inside as well. 

She wants to unravel the beast and meet the man behind, but I am scared that if she succeeded, she'll find nothing behind.

As long as the heroine was not involved, she would be fine. She just wanted to be a queen who brought disaster to the country and the people quietly, but the result was not what she wanted--
The man that the original owner had been struggling with and loved for many years but was hated by was the second male in the harem of the original heroine: %@%$&*...
The man she picked up on the street was the mortal enemy of the first male in the harem of the original heroine. He was killed by the original heroine and her harem in his previous life: &$*%$^-%...Can I still eat and sleep well and fight zombies (╯‵□′)╯︵┴─┴
She wants to live a good life and live with her father and brother in the end times, why is it so difficult?
Man: Follow my wife and I will have meat to eat.
Face the end times as soon as you travel through time, Song Liran said that survival is the most important thing. So, before the heroine comes, grab all the golden fingers of the original heroine?
Man: Whatever my wife does is right? (ˊωˋ*)? (Inside the man's mind: My wife helped me avenge my life, and I love my wife even more, what's wrong with that?)
The end of the world is coming, the weather changes suddenly, zombies are out of their cages, even animals and plants have changed, will people still be allowed to live?
Those flashy things, slapping people, swallowing animals and people, are you sure they are plants?

title: Their Hidden Treasure
description:
Two families, one secret, and one chance to make it all right.

The Ferrara and Caruso families are two of the most powerful families in New York. Their rivalry is a well-known fact, and it's been like that forever. The Ferraras always hated the Carusos, and vice versa.

17 years ago, something happened, and the two families were bound together. Their hatred for each other was cast aside in an attempt to protect what both families held dear to their hearts.

Sophia Diaz is a 16-year-old girl who lives with her caretakers. She isn't being treated well, and she is praying for the day when she will be able to leave and start her life somewhere far away. She knows about her family, who gave her up, but she doesn't want to see them ever again. If they loved her, they would have never left her with the monsters she was living with. Right?

What will happen when someone finds out about Ferrara and Caruso's hidden treasure? Will the families unite to protect it, or will the treasure be taken away from them?

title: Path Of The Dragon (A Dark Fantasy Cultivation Wuxia Xianxia Progression Series)
description:
When eight-year-old girl, Jie, sees an enormous lightning dragon hovering over her hospital bed, her first thought is to wonder what on earth the nurses put in her IV this time. But the dragon turns out to be terrifyingly real... as does the deal he offers.

Should she swear a blood pact under penalty of death, the dragon, Ming, promises to restore her health and provide her with revenge against those who crippled her and murdered her beloved family in front of her.

But in exchange, Jie must travel to a mystical, savage world where the strong take what they wish and the weak suffer and die. There, she must grow powerful enough to do battle with the followers of Fang Zhuyu, brutally unstoppable individuals capable of slaughtering entire armies of gods singlehandedly.

It will be up to her to save her new world and countless others from the nightmare of the ancient evil they wish to unleash.

title: 70's Prosperous Little Days
description:
七零红火小日子

As the only girl of the three generations of the Gu family, Gu Qingqing has been the baby bump of grandpa and grandma since she was a child.

 Dad is the captain of the production team, my second uncle is a well-known carpenter in ten miles and eight towns, my third uncle is a chef in a state-run restaurant, and my fourth uncle... Fourth uncle has a sharp mouth and good looks. There are many cousins in the family, and my two older brothers are both in the army, and my childhood is booming. 

One day, her second brother in the Construction Corps sent her a letter, in addition to food stamps and distribution allowances, there was also a photo. 

The man in military uniform with sword-like eyebrows and star-eyed eyes looked like he had left her air force pilot elder brother by how many blocks. 

Gu Qingqing immediately decided to visit relatives! Go Corps! ! Must get married! ! ! Even if she is soft and hard, she has to ask her second brother to draw a red line for this marriage for her.

 Many years later, two handsome young men from the Chu family asked their grandpa: "How did you know grandma back then?"

 Chu Dai held back a smile: "... Back then, your grandma only saw a photo of me, and she never traveled far away. She, who sat alone on the green leather train for a day and a night to go north, lied on your second uncle and grandpa and said that she was here to find a partner."

You would think it's cool to have a twin sister who shares the same hazel eyes and brown hair, the same nose and lips and who is approximately the same height as you are.

title: Court of Nightmares and Ruin
description:
Don't get frostbitten while reading this dark, gripping, passionate retelling of Snow White. 

Icelyn, the princess of the Winter Realm, is being used as a tether to unite the Winter and Summer Realms in an upcoming war. As a woman, she is seen as nothing more than chattel instead of the strong warrior she truly is. She longs to prove her worth to her father and people, but how do you accomplish that if never given a chance? When Icelyn's powers continue to strengthen, her evil stepmother decides that marrying her off may not be enough to rid the thorn in her side and takes a more drastic approach. For Icelyn, there is danger around every corner; even the mirrors have ears. To complicate matters, Icelyn learns that she is the fated mate of the King of the Night Realm, a wicked and unseelie fae that will do anything to claim what is rightfully his... When he comes to collect her, her entire world is turned upside down. Her fate was questionable in the Winter Realm, but how will she ever survive in a court of nightmares and ruin?

***

She was mine, and it was about time they learned that. I have sat by idly for years, knowing she belonged to me, and yet, I did nothing about it. I did not want a mate, they were a weakness I could not afford, but now they were trying to join her with another, and there was no way I would allow that.

"Ready or not, my little snowflake, here I come."

title: Forced to Raise Yanderes for a Living
description:
After enduring years of pain as a consequence of being confined by my Yandere stepbrother, I was finally freed from my misery by an unfortunate house fire. Since the goddess of the afterlife pitied me she gave me the opportunity to start anew through the means of transmigration.

In short, I must mould each universe's capture targets into model citizens. Seeing as I'll be reborn as a mob character I shouldn't have to worry too much about growing attached to any of these capture targets either. A task like this should be manageable for someone like me who wishes to simply blend into the background. 

The quicker I finish my missions, the quicker I'll get to retire to a world with the happy ending I've always wanted. What more could a girl want?

But wait. You're just now telling me that all of the capture targets have the potential to turn into Yanderes too? Not only that, but my stepbrother will be transmigrating into the same worlds as me too???

On second thoughts, I'd rather kiss my happy ending goodbye and stay dead instead!

title: Evelyn
description:
Found amid a winter storm as a baby, 19-year-old college student Evelyn Smith is beloved by her small Alaskan hometown. A regular volunteer at the public library where children flock to her, she is kind and good-natured. 

25-year-old Maximus Alexander is Alpha to one of the most powerful packs in America. Cold-natured to the outside world he really is just a lonely man who thinks that the moon goddess has cursed him to be mateless due to his past. Haunted by sweet dreams of the mate he hasn't met and doesn't think exists, he thinks all hope is lost. That is until a visit to a small allied pack changes everything. 

The only problem: She doesn't know werewolves exist. Let alone that her adopted parents are them.

title: Stealing The Yuri Protagonist Harem (Xianxia)
description:
After being transmigrated into a comedic yuri novel as a hapless cannon fodder male character, Luo Wusheng desire one thing only, and that is to survive the incoming battle that would eradicate every member of his Sect. However, the developments of things seem to be spiralling out of his control.

After a year full of hardwork, he noticed that some of the original Protagonist Harem Member, who are supposed to be into girls, behaved a little bit weird around him.

Soon, he realized why.

The Holy Maiden of the Demon Sect has a secret crush on him.

The Empress of the Immortal Nation wants to have him as her consort.

The Nine-Tailed Fox Netherqueen, the Monarch of the Netherkin Nation, wants to be his mate till the end of time.

"Little Yuli! Aren't you the original main character? Aren't they all your girl? Please get them off me!" Facing the surrounding sharks, Luo Wusheng cried for help.

As the original main character of this Yuri-Themed Xianxia World, the Protagonist nodded her head, and with a determination expression on her face, she answered, "You are right, the only one who can have you is me!"

Luo Wusheng, feeling stupified at her word, can only stare in shock toward the incoming meteor that is the female sword cultivator.

Luo Wusheng: ???, What's wrong with these girls??
